text:
The Owl NPC is a Greed Island animal that is used for delivering an invitation to the lucky winner of the Quiz contest. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

Appearance

The Owl looked like an average owl, with narrow eyes. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Once Gon collects the 99 designated cards and wins the quiz, this owl appears and gives him the card: Letter Invitation from the Island's Ruler. 

Card

This card's designated number is 110; therefore, it is not needed to finish the game. It is, however, an S-rank card with a 1-card limit. This makes it the rarest card in the game, along with Ruler's Blessing. 

Trivia

This card only appears when a player has collected the 99 designated cards and wins the quiz.
